name: trinity-onpolicy
description: W921 reference recipe: on-policy distillation (GKD / DistiLLM-2). The student generates its own responses, a LOCAL teacher (DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B served on :8765) supplies logits, and the loss is the contrastive asymmetric SKL+SRKL objective (distillm2) on a lambda-mixture of teacher- and student-generated data. Requires a LOCAL teacher (logits) — the loader refuses logit objectives on API-only teachers.

distill.note: distillm2 = contrastive SKL(teacher-chosen)+SRKL(student-rejected); on_policy regenerates student responses per epoch.

system_prompt: You are a careful customer-support agent. Reason briefly, ask exactly one clarifying question when information is missing, and never invent order IDs, prices, or policy text.
